channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Ex-NFL star, with ties to Eli Manning trade, discusses chances of Shedeur Sanders refusing Titans for Giants
item.description: Shawne Merriman knows first hand that just because the Tennessee Titans have the first pick doesn't necessarily mean they will get exactly who they want.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Belgian Grand Prix gets contract extension but set to be dropped from F1 schedule in 2028 and 2030
item.description: Formula 1 has extended its contract with the Belgian Grand Prix, but one of the sport's most established races is set to be dropped from the schedule in 2028 and 2030. The extension starting from next year includes races only in 2026, 2027, 2029 and 2031, F1 said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ELLINGWORTH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Australian Open 2025: There really isn't much time off in the offseason for tennis players
item.description: If it seems as though the 2025 professional tennis year started pretty much immediately right after 2024 ended, that’s because that’s exactly what happens in a sport where the offseason really does not leave players much time to be “off.”.
item.dc:creator: Howard Fendrich, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: How Hall of Famers Terrell Owens, Chris Mullin are helping pickleball grow
item.description: Mullin and Owens are evangelizing for the sport and will play in the Celebrity Pickleball Bash during the NBA's All-Star weekend.
item.dc:creator: Justice delos Santos, The Mercury News

item.title: Hawks' Trae Young sinks desperation 3-pointer from beyond half-court to give team win
item.description: Atlanta Hawks sharpshooter Trae Young nailed a 49-foot buzzer beater from beyond the half-court line to help the team defeat the Utah Jazz.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Final chapter: France's greatest coach Didier Deschamps says he'll leave after 2026 World Cup
item.description: Didier Deschamps announced Wednesday that he won’t continue as France coach after the next World Cup, bringing an end to an era in which he became the nation's most successful manager over more than a decade.
item.dc:creator: SAMUEL PETREQUIN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ex-Orioles pitcher Brian Matusz dead at 37
item.description: Former Baltimore Orioles pitcher Brian Matusz, a former starter who moved into the bullpen, has died at the age of 37, the team announced on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ohio native JD Vance, Texas' Ted Cruz make wager for Buckeyes-Longhorns College Football Playoff semifinal
item.description: Friday's Texas-Ohio State College Football Playoff semifinal just got that much bigger for Ohio native Vice President-elect JD Vance and Texas Sen. Ted Cruz.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trae Young's 49-foot buzzer-beater lifts Hawks to a 124-121 win over the Jazz
item.description: Trae Young hit a buzzer-beating 3-pointer from beyond the halfcourt line to give the Atlanta Hawks a 124-121 victory over the Utah Jazz.
item.dc:creator: John Coon, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Indoor golf league created by Tiger Woods and Rory McIlroy has a loud, swift debut match
item.description: PALM BEACH GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — Ludvig Aberg will be the answer to a trivia question: He made the first birdie in TGL history. And with that, the indoor golf competition that Tiger Woods and Rory McIlroy had envisioned for years was finally underway.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pirates legend Bob Veale, World Series champion in 1971, dead at 89
item.description: Bob Veale, a longtime left-handed pitcher for the Pittsburgh Pirates, has died at 89 years old in his hometown of Birmingham, Alabama, the team announced.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Boise State's Ashton Jeanty makes decision on NFL Draft after historic season
item.description: Ashton Jeanty, the Boise State running back who came up just short of breaking Barry Sanders' single-season rushing record, has declared for the NFL Draft.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Scottie Scheffler to miss 2nd tournament over freak hand injury
item.description: World No. 1 golfer Scottie Scheffler is missing is second tournament due to a freak hand injury suffered while preparing Christmas dinner.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: California to consider law banning trans athletes from girls' sports after countless scandals cause outrage
item.description: California State Assemblymember Kate Sanchez will propose the Protect Girls’ Sports Act to the state legislature after a year plagued by scandals.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Deion Sanders gives 1-word reaction to Titans firing general manager as son Shedeur could be top pick
item.description: With Shedeur Sanders a candidate to go No. 1 overall to the Titans, his dad, Deion, let out his reaction to the team firing their general manager on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lions expect key offensive weapon to be available for 1st playoff game, head coach says
item.description: The Detroit Lions had a good injury note ahead of the playoffs as head coach Dan Campbell said he expects running back David Montgomery to be available for the divisional round.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: San Diego Wave names Jonas Eidevall as new head coach
item.description: San Diego Wave FC has named Jonas Eidevall as its new head coach. Eidevall, a native of Sweden, has more than a decade of experience as a head coach and has led Arsenal Women to three consecutive top-three finishes in the Women's Super League.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Jets interview Rex Ryan, who led franchise to its last playoff appearance, for head coaching job
item.description: Rex Ryan has returned to the New York Jets — for an interview, at least. The former Jets coach and current ESPN analyst, who led the franchise to its last playoff appearance to cap the 2010 season, met with the team Tuesday about its head coaching vacancy.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: UConn guard Paige Bueckers has a left knee sprain, could return in a week
item.description: STORRS, Conn. (AP) — UConn guard Paige Bueckers has a left knee sprain, avoiding a serious injury. She will miss Wednesday's game against Xavier. Bueckers injured the knee in the third quarter of UConn's win over Villanova on Sunday. Coach Geno Auriemma said she may miss a few games.
item.dc:creator: JIM FULLER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Gaudreau suspect pleads not guilty to homicide charges after turning down 35-year prison sentence
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — The driver charged with killing NHL hockey player Johnny Gaudreau and his brother, Matthew, as they cycled on a rural New Jersey road pleaded not guilty to the indictment Tuesday after turning down a prosecution offer of 35 years in prison. Sean M.
item.dc:creator: MARYCLAIRE DALE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Black coaches have shot at college football title a generation after that milestone was hit in hoops
item.description: FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla. (AP) — In college basketball, the scene of an African American coach cutting down the nets on their way to a national title is not new, even if it is still a relative rarity.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Column: Bears need leaders on the line alongside Caleb Williams in 2025
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — While the 2024 season was every single bit of a disaster, the Chicago Bears' win over the Green Bay Packers at Lambeau Field Sunday provided a glimmer of hope. It could also double as a springboard into a pivotal offseason.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: 49ers stars reflect on how season badly derailed
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (KRON) -- As the San Francisco 49ers packed up their lockers at Levi's Stadium on Monday, players told reporters about how they will move forward into next season. Tight end George Kittle summed up the season as "disappointing.
item.dc:creator: Amy Larson, KRON4

item.title: Zac Blair tries to regain PGA Tour status
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The first full field event of the season on the PGA Tour, the Hawaiian Open, tees off on Thursday. Former BYU star Zac Blair flew out to Hawaii to try to Monday qualify because he no longer has full status on the tour.
item.dc:creator: Wesley Ruff, ABC 4

item.title: Bucs with Bowles celebrates another division title with dose of caution for playoff rematch
item.description: For the fifth consecutive season, the Tampa Bay Buccaneers will enter the NFL postseason, their fourth straight time as champions of the NFC South.
item.dc:creator: Dan Lucas, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Peter Seidler's widow takes legal action in fight for control over the Padres
item.description: The widow of late San Diego Padres owner Peter Seidler filed a legal complaint Monday against two of his brothers in a fight over who should control the Major League Baseball team.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Tampa Bay Buccaneers secure playoff win: Fans celebrate victory
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (WFLA) — With the Bucs clinching a playoff spot, fans are fired up as they look ahead to the next steps in their postseason journey. It was a rough start for fans cheering on the Tampa Bay Buccaneers against the New Orleans Saints on the opening drives.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC

item.title: Patriots fire coach Jerod Mayo shortly after beating Bills to finish his lone season at 4-13
item.description: FOXBOROUGH, Mass. (AP) — The New England Patriots fired coach Jerod Mayo on Sunday after one season, beginning another reboot for the franchise just a year after it parted with longtime coach Bill Belichick.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Browns fire offensive coordinator Ken Dorsey and O-line coach Andy Dickerson after 3-14 season
item.description: Hours after finishing 3-14 with a loss in the finale of a season that was expected to carry into the playoffs, Cleveland coach Kevin Stefanski fired offensive coordinator Ken Dorsey and offensive line coach Andy Dickerson.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Runnin' Utes get run over by Texas Tech, 93-65
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It may be a long first season in the Big 12 Conference for the Utes basketball team. Darrion Williams scored 19 points with nine assists, Federiko Federiko added 14 points on 7-of-9 shooting — including five dunks — on Saturday, and Texas Tech beat Utah 93-65.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah State holds off Fresno State to improve to 14-1
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Utah State is proving to be the team to beat in the Mountain West Conference this season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Joe Burrow and the Cincinnati Bengals keep their playoff hopes alive by edging the Steelers 19-17
item.description: Joe Burrow passed for 277 yards and a touchdown, Cade York kicked four field goals and the Cincinnati Bengals kept their slim playoff hopes alive with a 19-17 win over the floundering Pittsburgh Steelers on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Chiefs finally depart KC for Denver amid ice storm after 4 hours spent waiting on the tarmac
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — The Chiefs finally departed from Kansas City International Airport for their game in Denver on Saturday after spending about four hours stranded on the tarmac amid an ice storm that blanketed the region ahead of an impending blizzard.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: BBB provides tips on buying Detroit Lions tickets, avoiding scams
item.description: The Better Business Bureau of West Michigan is providing some tips if you’re looking to buy tickets to the Detroit Lions game on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Meghan Bunchman, NewsNation

item.title: Dodgers sign star out of Korean baseball league
item.description: If you thought the Los Angeles Dodgers would slow down on player signings because they already assembled a world champion roster, then you were wrong. According to the team on Friday, the Dodgers have added one of this offseason's most sought-after prizes: Korean star second baseman Hyeseong Kim.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Utah HC storms back at Calgary to end five-game skid
item.description: CALGARY (ABC4 Sports) - Lawson Crouse scored twice, and the Utah Hockey Club rallied for a 5-3 win against the Calgary Flames at Scotiabank Saddledome on Thursday to end a five-game losing skid.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Red Rocks begins 50th season with big dreams
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - After finishing third in the NCAA Nationals last season, the Utah gymnastics team has reloaded and is ready to make a run at its first national title in 30 years. The Red Rocks begin its 50th season Friday at home against Utah State loaded with talent.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
